title: teucrium pumilum subsp. lepicephalum
intro: Teucrium pumilum subsp. lepicephalum, also known as small-leaved marjoram or alpine germander, is a plant species in the mint family Lamiaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Teucrium pumilum subsp. lepicephalum include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments, including respiratory issues and skin conditions.
